title: Better Campfires: 3D Logs + Cozy Crackle
description: Better campfires with balanced 3D logs, properly seated cooking food, cozy ASMR crackle sound, and softened smoke for cleaner visuals. Vanilla-friendly and shader-compatible.
body:
FernlitCraft's Better Campfires: 3D Logs + Cozy Crackles upgrades vanilla campfires with a more balanced, cozy look and sound — without changing gameplay.

What this pack does

Upgraded 3D log model with better proportions (less bulky, more “real” campfire shape)

Food sits neatly on the logs (no awkward hovering look)

Softer smoke that’s less distracting on screen

Custom cozy crackling audio for a more ASMR / ambience-friendly campfire

Shader-friendly: looks great in vanilla and works beautifully with shaders

Compatibility

Minecraft: 1.14+ → 1.21.11+

Resolution: 16x16

Works with: vanilla textures and most resource packs (anything that doesn’t replace campfire models/sounds may stack fine)

No Dependencies

Install

Download the .zip

Put it in: .minecraft/resourcepacks

Enable in Options → Resource Packs

(Optional) Move it higher in the pack list so it overrides other packs.

Notes

This is a visual + audio upgrade only (no gameplay changes).

If another pack also edits campfire models/particles/sounds, whichever is higher in the list wins.

Links
